task_description: Create a Siri-like animated overlay popup for JARVIS that appears when wake word is detected. The overlay shows at the bottom-center of the screen as a frameless transparent widget with animated orb/waveform, transitions between LISTENING/SPEAKING/THINKING states, and fades out when done.

verification.summary: All AST syntax checks pass. overlay_widget.py imports successfully with QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen. main.py, tray_service.py all parse without errors. No test framework in project - verified via import and syntax validation.
